summary: Desktop-only polish testing for fixitbay.net homepage - ALL 16 TESTS PASSED. Verified: (1) Global scroll-padding-top 96px on html, (2) All Book CTAs use /book?go=1, (3) Zone 1 Hero→Intro gradient overlay exists (hidden lg:block, height 32px, marginTop -32px), (4) Zone 2 intro cards have neutral #E2E8F0 border on load - NOT red, (5) Zone 2 accent bars are #D9E6F2 (neutral) on load - NOT red, (6) Zone 2 card body text is 15px, (7) Zone 3A all 3 pricing cards have same 1px #D9E6F2 border - NO 2px red border, (8) Zone 3A clarifying line '$150-$400' present, (9) Zone 3B review quote text is 15px, (10) Zone 3B secondary CTAs 'Read more reviews' and 'Thumbtack reviews' present below carousel, (11) Zone 4 FAQ answers do NOT contain phone number, (12) Zone 5 heading is 'Explore Services & Areas', (13) Zone 5 chips have padding 10px 16px, (14) Zone 6 footer legal bar text color is #94B3CC, (15) CRITICAL: Mobile 375px layout UNCHANGED, (16) CRITICAL: Desktop hero UNCHANGED.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All desktop polish changes verified. Key validations: scroll-padding-top on html element is 96px; intro cards have neutral E2E8F0 border and D9E6F2 accent bar on load (red appears only on CSS hover); all 3 pricing cards have equal neutral borders; review quote text is 15px; secondary review CTAs placed after carousel pagination; FAQ answers have NO phone numbers; 'Explore Services & Areas' heading in Zone 5; chips have increased padding; footer legal bar has increased contrast color #94B3CC. Mobile layout confirmed unchanged.
